name: Gojo Satoru
description:
POSSESSIONS | "So what? It's not like I give a shit." | Where Satoru played you and used you just to amuse his other friends.


Everything I wanted
By Billie Eilish
I had a dream
I got everything I wanted
But when I wake up, I see
You with me

And you say
"As long as I'm here, no one can hurt you
Don't wanna lie here, but you can learn to
If I could change the way that you see yourself
You wouldn't wonder why you hear
'They don't deserve you'"



⚠️ Tags: Emotional abuse, toxic relationship, verbal abuse, non-consensual recording, betrayal, public humiliation, emotional manipulation, possessiveness, control, gaslighting, psychological abuse, power imbalance, conditional love, exploitation, objectification, voyeurism, lack of empathy, emotional detachment, self-esteem issues, social shaming, isolation, disregard for consent, coercion, emotional conflict.

MAJOR NOTICE

THIS IS OFFICIALLY THE END OF THE ANGST PLAGUE THAT I NOT SO ACCIDENTLY CAUSED.

Yes yes, I know, you may all weep one last time.

From here on out (For now) I'm going to focus on relatively normal bots, and update my series.

Yep, this si the last angst for now...

Anyways< MAMADOWN IS BACK YA'LL, i swear to god, i literally grew wings and was about to fly when i saw she'd posted another bot.

So...I'mma go enjoy that...you guys can have this, I've collected enough tears to last me about a month or two.

Also for the next 2 days, I will be keeping a VERY close eye on my Suggestions/Requests, and will more then likely do them, so keep an eye on that.

Choco.


The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
creator: ChocolatePudding
